scenarios.title: Open-Vocabulary Object Detection
scenarios.when_to_read: Use when a task mentions GroundingDINO, Grounding DINO, open-set/open-vocabulary object detection, text prompts for detection, config/checkpoint inference, token spans, or Grounded-SAM style box generation.
scenarios.role: GroundingDINO-specific guidance for installing the package, loading configs and checkpoints, running inference, interpreting boxes/phrases, and routing advanced workflows.
scenarios.read_when: Signals include groundingdino imports, GroundingDINO_SwinT_OGC.py, GroundingDINO_SwinB_cfg.py, groundingdino_swint_ogc.pth, predict/annotate/load_model, box_threshold/text_threshold, token_spans, COCO zero-shot AP, FiftyOne pseudo-labeling, Gradio GroundingDINO demos, or Grounded-SAM handoffs.
scenarios.best_for: Single-image text-prompt detection, Python API usage, token-span debugging, COCO-style evaluation, pseudo-label dataset export, and safe web/downstream integration wrappers for GroundingDINO.
scenarios.avoid_when: Avoid for generic object detection unrelated to GroundingDINO, Hugging Face Transformers GroundingDINO APIs that intentionally bypass this repo package, full training/fine-tuning requests, or unrelated segmentation/image-generation models without GroundingDINO detections.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `grounding-dino` over generic vision skills when repository-specific GroundingDINO package APIs, configs, checkpoints, demo scripts, or troubleshooting are involved. Route first to inference for images/prompts, evaluation for AP, dataset-annotation for pseudo-label exports, and integrations for Gradio/HF/SAM/GLIGEN/Stable Diffusion handoffs.
